name: Atera Agent Installation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Atera Agent Installation
SIGMA Description: Detects successful installation of Atera Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) agent as recently found to be used by Conti operators

False positives:
- Legitimate Atera agent installation

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=1033 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND LOWER(Message) LIKE '%ateraagent%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Atera Agent Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=1033 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND LOWER(Message) LIKE '%ateraagent%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
